subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards the horizon of his Lord's Will, the All-Glorious, the All-Bountiful, that the verses of God may draw him unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن اقبل الی افق اراده ربه العزیز الوهاب لتجذبه آیات الله الی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
